Risk: Severe multicollinearity between climate predictors (rainfall, NDVI, temperature)
Mitigation: Compute VIF matrix pre-modelling; use LASSO for automatic selection; report VIF in report
Contingency: Apply PCA to correlated climate block; use PC scores as inputs

Risk: Colab session disconnects during long model training
Mitigation: Save model checkpoints every 50 estimators; use joblib to pickle intermediate models
Contingency: Reduce n_estimators; use Kaggle Notebooks (12 hr session) for heavy training

Mitigation: Document synthetic generation methodology fully; compare synthetic distributions to published Kitui field data from KNBS/KIHBS
Contingency: Frame as 'simulation study to validate methodology'; note it as a limitation

Risk: Synthetic data yields unrealistic model R² (too high — data leakage)
Mitigation: Generate yields from a noisy formula with genuine irreducible error (ε~N(0,0.25)); blind model to formula
Contingency: Add more noise terms; validate that train R² and test R² are within 0.10 of each other

Mitigation: Submit AppEEARS request in Session 6 immediately; use GEE JavaScript alternatively
Contingency: Use MODIS MOD13Q1 pre-processed tiles from Google Earth Engine public datasets

Risk: SoilGrids REST API returns null for some grid cells in Kitui
Mitigation: Use bounding-box query for full county; fill nulls via nearest-neighbour interpolation
Contingency: Use ISRIC WoSIS dataset downloaded as CSV

Risk: NASA POWER API rate-limited or endpoint changes
Mitigation: Cache all API responses locally on first pull; use ERA5 reanalysis as backup via CDS API
Contingency: Download ERA5 monthly aggregates via Copernicus CDS; manual CSV upload to Drive

Mitigation: All work committed to GitHub daily; Drive auto-syncs; share repo with supervisor
Contingency: Access GitHub and Colab from any smartphone, computer, or cyber café

Risk: Phone storage full — unable to cache large raster files
Mitigation: All data stored in Google Drive, not on device; keep raw rasters in Drive only
Contingency: Free up storage; use Drive as streaming source

Risk: Insufficient literature sources on Kitui-specific yields
Mitigation: Use KALRO reports, KNBS agricultural surveys, WFP VAM, and FEWS NET as grey literature
Contingency: Broaden to Kenya ASALs and East Africa; cite as 'comparable ASAL contexts'
